prestazioni: Engine: N74B66 6.6L Twin-Turbo V12 (660hp stock) – Full billet aluminum crankshaft upgrade from Manley Performance with 4340 steel connecting rods and Mahle Motorsport forged pistons (10.5:1 compression ratio) for 900hp+ reliability on E85 fuel. Custom Garrett GTX5533R Gen II turbochargers with titanium-aluminide turbine wheels, 1.15 A/R turbine housings, and BorgWarner EFR wastegates for 32 psi peak boost.

Drivetrain: Bespoke 8-speed ZF 8HP95X transmission with a Pankl Racing Systems billet input shaft, upgraded torque converter from Sonnax (stall speed increased to 3,200 RPM), and a Quaife ATB differential with 40% lockup for aggressive launches. Custom carbon-fiber driveshaft from GKN Driveline with a 1,200 Nm torque rating.

Suspension & Braking: Full Ohlins TTX46 coilover system with 3-way adjustable damping (compression, rebound, and high-speed compression), custom-machined aluminum top mounts from KW Suspension, and Eibach ERS race springs (30% stiffer than stock). Brembo GT-R 6-piston monoblock calipers with 420mm carbon-ceramic rotors (upgraded from stock 395mm) and Ferodo DS3000 brake pads for 1.2g deceleration.
estetica: Body: Full custom Rocket Bunny widebody kit (Droptail-specific) with carbon-fiber fenders, front splitter, and rear diffuser, all finished in Amethyst Purple with a 3-stage pearlescent clear coat from PPG. Custom 3D-printed active aero elements (front canards and rear wing) from 9 Lives Racing, adjustable via a MoTeC PDM for dynamic downforce tuning.

Interior: Full Alcantara-wrapped dashboard and door cards with Amethyst Purple contrast stitching from Katzkin, paired with a custom roll cage from Safety Devices (FIA-spec, T45 steel) wrapped in Alcantara. Bespoke Recaro Pole Position seats with 6-point Schroth harnesses and a custom digital dash from AIM MXS Strada (replacing the stock analog cluster).

Wheels & Tires: Custom 22-inch forged wheels from HRE (FF16 model) with a 10.5-inch front and 12.5-inch rear width, wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (285/30 front, 325/25 rear). Center-lock wheel nuts from BBS and titanium wheel studs from ARP for rapid tire changes.
